name: cantip-workspace
description: Workspace for the cantip docs engine and its scaffolder.

scripts.release: npm publish -w cantip && npm publish -w create-cantip

comments.overrides: Force a single @types/hast@3 across the tree. The Remix dev-only MDX toolchain (@mdx-js/mdx) pulls v2-era hast type packages; without this they collide with the v3 types cantip's hast pipeline uses. Run `npm dedupe` after install so the root copy is v3 too.
